title: Luban 编辑器第1波：核心增强 + 低代码三要素
branchStrategy: 各子仓 feature/luban-editor-wave1 同名分支

children.title: 表达式引擎(自研沙箱{{}}AST白名单) + NodeSchema扩展(visible/loop/events/datasource/locked/hidden) + 双定义收口
children.gate: 表达式单测覆盖≥90%; 沙箱禁 eval/Function/new; NodeSchema single source(low-code canonical, engine re-export)

children.title: datasource 后端持久化(Java Flyway V20260619000001 + Go initSchema + 双端CRUD + Contract Test) + bff代理 + engine api
children.gate: Java mvn verify 绿; Go go test 绿; Contract Test 双端字段一致; AuthFilter/RequireAdmin 写操作 admin-only

children.title: 编辑器交互(useHistory撤销栈 + useKeyboard快捷键 Ctrl+S/Z/Y/C/V/Del + Sortable group跨容器拖拽 + lock/hide编辑态过滤)
children.gate: 撤销/重做E2E; 跨容器拖拽E2E; 快捷键E2E; lock/hide不破坏现有 drop 新增语义

children.title: RuntimeRenderer 条件渲染(visible) + 循环渲染(loop) + 事件绑定(events动作) + datasource顶层注入
children.gate: visible false 不渲染; loop 按数据源多次渲染; events click 触发动作; datasource 注入表达式上下文

children.title: PropertyPanel 两新分区(事件/数据源) + PageEditor 接线(update:event/update:datasource)
children.gate: 两分区配置写入 node schema; 联动 RuntimeRenderer; 撤销栈记录

children.title: 6 物料(Table/Menu/Tabs/Modal/Drawer/Toast) + propsSchema + 注册
children.gate: 6 物料物料单测覆盖≥90%; Table 绑 datasource 演示数据驱动; 多端渲染一致

children.title: 样式属性面板(color/margin/padding/typography) — 残余项, 延后第1.5波
children.gate: 延后: 已在 .agents/plans/2026-06-19-luban-editor-wave1.md §10 显式延后 + .agents/todos/2026-06-19-w1-t7-style-panel.md todo 记录, 非静默跳过
